snippet.title: Nadia Mukami Ft Otile Brown - KOLO (Official Video) SMS SKIZA 5801644 TO 811
snippet.description:
#Nadia #Ngomma
SEVENS CREATIVE HUB  presents to you Nadia Mukami's 14th studio single and her 1st track off her upcoming Album. Nadia Mukami is an award winning female artist from Kenya and has fast been gaining global audience & popularity with her fluent swahili lyricism, mellow voice and soothing melodies. Nadia Mukami has been nominated at the MTV Awards under the category, Fanbase Award. 'KOLO' is an Afro- Pop classic banger recorded by Nadia Mukami and Otile Brown. 'KOLO' is a fun- social song that celebrates the African culture through its original sound, guitar and afro beats , with the lyrics honoring the Swahili culture which is vast spoken in Eastern Africa while appreciating the authenticity of the production. The song is basically a celebratory classic during happy occasions that praises both the African boy and girlchild in a metaphorical context and draws inspiration from them Mushrooms, a legendary late 90's band.

Executive Producer: Sevens Creative Hub
Audio Produced by: Vicky pon Dis
Written and performed by: Nadia Mukami & Otile Brown
Performed by: Nadia Mukami & Otile Brown
Video Directed by: Hanscana

For Bookings Contact:
0110020395/ 0733839198
nadiamukamibookings@gmail.com
sevenscreativehub@gmail.com







ALL COPYRIGHTS RESERVED WHETHER IN LYRICS, VISUALS , PERFORMANCE OR VOICE.

snippet.title: Kenya's 'Spy Queen', Private Detective Jane Mugo - BBC Africa Eye documentary
snippet.description:
Kenya has a real version of the spy James Bond, and her name is Jane. Detective Jane Mugo is the country’s most famous and controversial private investigator. She says she’s solved hundreds of crimes, but some say she writes her own rules. This is the inside story of the woman they call Kenya’s 'Spy Queen.'

BBC Africa’s Sharon Machira has been investigating.

snippet.title: I was cooking for my husband's side chick and I had no idea - Rose Williams | Tuko Talks | Tuko TV
snippet.description:
Rose never thought her husband of seven years would one day show up with one of their employees to their house, have her make delicious dinner, then later on tell her he wanted the employee for a second wife.
I mean, she thought the girl was visiting them as a friend but all this time, she was cooking and entertaining her co wife.
Rose says there is no way in life she will ever accept a co wife but her ex husband comes from a region where a man can have as many wives as possible
The mother of two says after she refused her husbands offer, he went ahead and settled with the employee leaving them with nothing. She also adds that what hurts her most us the fact she always thought she was enough for him
She sat down with Lynn Ngugi for this exclusive episode of Tuko Talks

The mother of two says after she refused her husbands offer, he went ahead and settled with the employee leaving them with nothing. She also adds that what hurts her most us the fact she always thought she was enough for him
She sat down with Lynn Ngugi for this exclusive episode of Tuko Talks

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Southampton vs Arsenal (1-3) | Pepe, Saka & Lacazette fire us to victory
snippet.description:
We came from behind to claim all three points on the road and make it six games without defeat in the Premier League.

The forward line was in excellent form all evening with Nicolas Pepe, Bukayo Saka and Alexandre Lacazette all on target as we gained swift revenge for the weekend's FA Cup defeat here at St Mary's.

The Saints needed just three minutes to open the scoring, but we should have been ahead even before that. Granit Xhaka released Lacazette into the box, but the Frenchman's low shot was saved by the legs of Alex McCarthy as he bore down on goal.

The miss was compounded when the hosts went ahead through a thumping Stuart Armstrong volley from James Ward-Prowse's out-swinging corner.

We maintained our intensity though and got on terms through Pepe, who kept his cool inside the box to slide the ball into the corner after being set up by Xhaka.

Chances kept coming and it was certainly a more entertaining match than the FA Cup game here just three days ago, with Pepe and Saka seeing plenty of the ball on the wings.

The game eventually settled down, though it remained entertaining with both sides pushing men forward.

We went into the break in the lead thanks to a wonderful goal from Saka. Lacazette fed the youngster with a perfectly weighted pass, and the England man did the rest – skipping past McCarthy and then calmly rolled the ball home right footed from outside the box. It was his fourth goal in his last six league starts - he is certainly enjoying life on the right wing.

It was a much more measured start to the second half. The game was on a knife edge as the hosts began to peg us back.

But our third goal killed their impetus. The impressive Cedric found Saka on the opposite flank, and his low cross was converted from close range by Lacazette.

Bernd Leno made a superb save from a Ward-Prowse free-kick late on and Rob Holding tackled Che Adams in the area as Southampton made us work until the last minute for the three points that lift us to eighth.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #bukayosaka #nicolaspepe

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: Mejja on breaking up with his wife, being homeless and why he gives free collabos| Tuko Talks
snippet.description:

Though he now admits to Tuko Talks host Lynn Ngugi he is no longer in a relationship, he respectfully says his ex was one of his biggest supporters and he will always be grateful to her.
He also talks of his homeless days, how Clemo and his wife housed and fed him for months and why he gives free collabos

snippet.title: NEW: MURUTANI WA THA BY PHYLLIS MBUTHIA (Official video) skiza 5960343 send to 811.Be blessed
snippet.description:
When I read the Old Testament when every sin mistake and error was punished right on the spot,  there was no chance for appeal ,no mercy was shown to offenders, am saddened.
Today we enjoy  forgiveness to a point of making it our RIGHT...
this wouldn't be possible if and only if CHRIST was not born to the human race...
yet i will praise you Jesus Christ for teaching the world mercy and going all out to show it to all humans whether they acknowledge it or not, you don't plan to revoke it from us.
 As we all enjoy mercy and abundant room for appeal  may Christ receive his glorious praises from my heart.
You are welcome friends to praise with me as you subcribe .

snippet.title: SUKARI YA ZUCHU YALETA GUMZO/AWADATISHA DIAMOND NA TANASHA
snippet.description:
𝕎𝔸𝕋ℂℍ 𝕎𝔸𝕊𝔸𝔽𝕀 𝕋𝕍 📺
𝗔𝗭𝗔𝗠-𝟰𝟭𝟭 | 𝗗𝗦𝗧𝗩 𝟮𝟵𝟲 | 𝗭𝗨𝗞𝗨-𝟬𝟮𝟴 
𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦-𝟰𝟰𝟰 & 𝟯𝟯𝟯 | 𝗖𝗢𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗩-𝟮𝟬 |𝗗𝗼𝗱𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲-𝟭𝟭𝟯
𝑰𝑵𝑺𝑻𝑨𝑮𝑹𝑨𝑴: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘄𝘄𝘄.𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝘁𝘃/
𝑻𝑾𝑰𝑻𝑻𝑬𝑹: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘁𝘄𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝘁𝘃/

snippet.title: Wabunge Simba Arati na Silvanus Osoro warushiana ngumi
snippet.description: Kizaazaa kilizuka katika hafla ya mazishi ya babake naibu wa gavana wa kisii joash maangi baada ya wabunge simba arati na sylvanus osoro kupigana mbele ya waombolezaji wakiwemo naibu rais william ruto na kinara wa odm raila odinga. Ni tukio lililosababisha kusitishwa kwa mazishi hayo kwa dakika chache. Ilimlazimu maangi kuingilia kati na kuwatuliza wafuasi wa wabunge hao wawili

snippet.title: MPs Simba Arati and Sylvanus Osoro fight at a funeral in Kisii
snippet.description: The burial ceremony of Abel Gongera - the father to kisii deputy Govenor Joash maangi was momentarily after MPs Simba arati engaged in a fist fight at the podium. Politics has dominated the burial with is being attended by Deputy president William Ruto and ODM leader Raila Odinga

snippet.title: Uganda's Bobi Wine: 'The situation is desperate'
snippet.description:
The opposition party in Uganda is calling for the release of its leader Bobi Wine, who has been under house arrest since polling day, and the re-election of long-term President, Yoweri Museveni.

Mr Wine says military troops have surrounded his home, not allowing him to leave, who claim they are protecting him for his own safety.

He also raised concerns about the safety of colleagues, after their headquarters were allegedly raided.

snippet.title: Arsenal’s David Luiz red carded: I JUST DON’T AGREE! - Craig Burley | ESPN FC
snippet.description:
Arsenal looked to be in cruise control until David Luiz was sent off at the stroke of halftime, but it was Wolves who defeated Mikel Arteta’s side 2-1. ESPN FC’s Craig Burley doesn’t necessarily agree with David Luiz’s sending off, citing it was accidental contact. Frank Leboeuf also joins the show, who agrees it was a penalty, but says there “was no clear intention” to warrant a red card. Shaka Hislop, Burley and Leboeuf recap VAR’s use in the Premier League, where Arsenal go from here and what laws need to be re-assessed moving forward. Plus, the FC guys reference the penalty awarded to Manchester United late on against Southampton.
#ESPNFC #Arsenal #EPL #PremierLeague #Wolves 

✔ Subscribe to ESPN+: http://espnplus.com/soccer/youtube
✔ Subscribe to ESPN FC on YouTube: http://bit.ly/SUBSCRIBEtoESPNFC

snippet.title: MORE Details Leaks Why Simba Arati - Sylvanus Osoro Confronted Each Other infront of Ruto and Raila
snippet.description:
MORE Details Leaks Why Simba Arati - Sylvanus Osoro Confronted Each Other infront of Ruto and Raila | What MP Simba Arati told DP Ruto

There was drama in Kisii Monday when legislators Simba Arati of Dagoreti and his South Mugirango counterpart Sylvanus Osoro fought on the podium, during a funeral service attended by Deputy President William Ruto and former Prime Minister Raila Odinga.

They were among leaders attending the funeral of Abel Gongera, the father of Kisii Deputy Governor Joash Maangi.

Trouble started when Arati rose to speak and castigated the hustler nation, the movement spearheaded by the Deputy President on empowering the youth and that is when Osoro shot up and went engaged him in a fist fight before they were separated by leaders present and their bodyguards.

Lee Makwiny is a Youtube Channel focusing on Kenyan Politics, Breaking news, Trending news in Kenya today, Latest in Kenya, Analysis of Raila Odinga, William Ruto and Uhuru Kenyatta speeches which you cant find in KTN, NTV and Citizen tv Live.

They were among leaders attending the funeral of Abel Gongera, the father of Kisii Deputy Governor Joash Maangi.

Trouble started when Arati rose to speak and castigated the hustler nation, the movement spearheaded by the Deputy President on empowering the youth and that is when Osoro shot up and went engaged him in a fist fight before they were separated by leaders present and their bodyguards.

Lee Makwiny is a Youtube Channel focusing on Kenyan Politics, Breaking news, Trending news in Kenya today, Latest in Kenya, Analysis of Raila Odinga, William Ruto and Uhuru Kenyatta speeches which you cant find in KTN, NTV and Citizen tv Live.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! ❤️
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! 🥺

ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts

MsMunchie: @MsMunchie

snippet.title: Reaction from around the Premier League after Frank Lampard was sacked as Chelsea manager
snippet.description:
► Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

Premier League managers have been reacting to news of the sacking of Frank Lampard from Chelsea.

Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says he has sympathy for Frank Lampard and hopes to meet with him after lockdown, while Brendan Rodgers believes the former Chelsea boss was not given enough time.

#SkySportsNews #SkySports #FrankLampard

snippet.title: Burial brawl: Embarrassing scenes in Kisii as political leaders exchange kicks, blows at a funeral
snippet.description:
There was drama in Kisii Monday when legislators Simba Arati of Dagoreti North and his South Mugirango counterpart Sylvanus Osoro fought on the podium, during a funeral service attended by Deputy President William Ruto and former prime minister Raila Odinga. The two whose politically differences would end in a public fight were among leaders attending the funeral of Abel Gongera, the father of Kisii Deputy Governor Joash Maangi

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: DIAMOND PLATNUMZ : HARMONIZE AKITAKA KURUDI WASAFI/ INATEGEMEA ALIONDOKAJE
snippet.description:
𝕎𝔸𝕋ℂℍ 𝕎𝔸𝕊𝔸𝔽𝕀 𝕋𝕍 📺
𝗔𝗭𝗔𝗠-𝟰𝟭𝟭 | 𝗗𝗦𝗧𝗩 𝟮𝟵𝟲 | 𝗭𝗨𝗞𝗨-𝟬𝟮𝟴 
𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦-𝟰𝟰𝟰 & 𝟯𝟯𝟯 | 𝗖𝗢𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗩-𝟮𝟬 |𝗗𝗼𝗱𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲-𝟭𝟭𝟯
𝑰𝑵𝑺𝑻𝑨𝑮𝑹𝑨𝑴: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘄𝘄𝘄.𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝘁𝘃/
𝑻𝑾𝑰𝑻𝑻𝑬𝑹: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘁𝘄𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝘁𝘃/
𝑭𝑨𝑪𝑬𝑩𝑶𝑶𝑲: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘄𝘄𝘄.𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗲𝗯𝗼𝗼𝗸.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝘁𝘃/

𝕃𝕀𝕊𝕋𝔼ℕ 𝕎𝔸𝕊𝔸𝔽𝕀 𝔽𝕄 📻
𝟴𝟴.𝟵 𝗗𝗔𝗥 𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗔𝗠 📻 | 𝟭𝟬𝟰.𝟭 𝗗𝗢𝗗𝗢𝗠𝗔 📻 | 𝟵𝟰.𝟱 𝗔𝗥𝗨𝗦𝗛𝗔 📻
𝔽𝕆𝕃𝕃𝕆𝕎 𝕌𝕊 𝕆ℕ:
𝑰𝑵𝑺𝑻𝑨𝑮𝑹𝑨𝑴: 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝘄𝘄𝘄.𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺.𝗰𝗼𝗺/𝘄𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗶𝗳𝗺/

snippet.title: Zlatan Ibrahimović's exact words that made Romelu Lukaku lose it | Oh My Goal
snippet.description:
Today, Oh My Goal is taking a look at the huge fight between Zlatan Ibrahimović and Romelu Lukaku during the Milan derby.

Zlatan Ibrahimović and Romelu Lukaku were very close to getting in a physical altercation, but why?

Lip reading experts have revealed the content of the exchange between Zlatan Ibrahimović and Romelu Lukaku, which made the Inter Milan player lose his temper.

#Zlatan #Ibrahimovic #Lukaku

snippet.title: Basi latumbukia Bahari Hindi katika kivuko cha Likoni watu wawili wakiponea kifo chupu chupu
snippet.description:
Watu wawili wameponea kifo baada ya basi walimokuwa wakisafiria kutumbukia katika kivuko cha feri cha Likoni, Mombasa

Gari hilo la kampuni ya Pollsman Safari lilitumbukia katika kivuko cha feri cha Likoni baada ya dereva aliyekuwa akiliendesha kupoteza mwelekeo kutokana na utelezi uliosababiswa na mvua iliokuwa ikinyesha.

snippet.title: Joefes, Mejja, Mbuzi Gang - Shamra Shamra (Official Video)
snippet.description:
#mejja #mbuzigang #blackmarketrecords
Joefes x Mejja x Mbuzi Gang (Mbuzi Gvng is iPhoolish, Fathermoh, Joefes) performing "Shamra Shamra" (Official Video) https://va.lnk.to/shamrashamra ©2021 Black Market Records, ℗2021 Black October Music (BMI) all rights reserved. #shamrashamra #joefes #iphoolish #fathermoh

Follow all things Joefes:
http://bit.ly/JoefesTV
http://bit.ly/JoefesSpotify
https://bit.ly/JoefesAppleMusic
https://www.instagram.com/joefes254/
https://www.facebook.com/joefes254/
https://www.twitter.com/joefes254/

Subscribe for all of the iPhoolish updates and link in on his social media:
https://VA.lnk.to/freshprincefromkisii
https://va.lnk.to/hideaway
https://black-market-records.lnk.to/e...
Vevo: http://bit.ly/iPhoolishVEVO
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iphoolishBmr/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Iphoolish/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/blackmarket247?s=09
Twitter: https://twitter.com/bmrafrika?s=09

Biography:
Joefes was born in Kisumu City, Kenya in the mid-90s and named Joseph Getugi Nyamweya then later nicknamed Joe after his Dad's favorite actor at the time. after high school, Feswaj rebranded and changed his name to Joefes. Around 2014 Joefes met iPhoolish who later introduced him to Sam C. In the same year Joefes did a couple of tracks under Sam C. Joefes joined campus, Pwani University. Late 2015 Joefes started to work on his first mixtape, Metamorphosis, which was then released in 2016 under Sam C's label Republik music. He also released his first music video the same year (Ebibengi). School got better of him and he took a break before releasing another video early 2017 (Igwe). In 2018 Joefes got contacted by Black Market Records with an ideal offer, a contract. He was already in a crew consisting of his 'day ones' iPhoolish, Tatinomi and Dace (Urban Village Sounds) In Mid 2018 he signed a deal with Black Market Records.
#mbuzi #blackmarketrecords #blackmarketafrika #cedsing

#enigma #iphoolish #blackmarketrecords
iPhoolish performing "Enigma" Full Album https://VA.lnk.to/shamrashamr ©2020 Black Market Records, ℗2020 Black October Music (BMI), all rights reserved.

Subscribe for all of the iPhoolish updates and link in on his social media:
https://VA.lnk.to/freshprincefromkisii
https://va.lnk.to/hideaway
https://black-market-records.lnk.to/e...
Vevo: http://bit.ly/iPhoolishVEVO
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iphoolishBmr/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Iphoolish/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/blackmarket247?s=09
Twitter: https://twitter.com/bmrafrika?s=09

Biography
Iphoolish, who recently collaborated with Tunji in a track is also a solo artist. He is a Kenyan music artist who grew up in Kisii, Iphoolish started his music career in 2009 as a contemporary artist. (2011) he released his first single called “ unexpected arrival”he started dominating the hip-hop scene, he released his first hip-hop track “she shine” then released “naira bae and save the day”. He was signed into Black Market Records in 2018 as a recording artist. He released his debut Album (Enigma) on 18 march (2019). Alongside his rap game, iphoolish is a lyrical genius, he writes his own songs.
He has also collaborated with artists like Joefes, Tatinomi in (killbeez) Sam C , the Hunter Misanta in (the meet up) among many other artists. He is focused on making his music a household name in the rap industry, iPhoolish feels that hip hop scene has lost touch. His lyrical touch is greatly influenced by his daily experiences and his emotions. He is a co-founder Republiq Empire.
iPhoolish’s single “she fine” got him a nomination in the International West Coast Hip-hop Awards as the International hip-hop artist of the year. iPhoolish wants his music to leave a legendary trail in the history of man, he wants to dominate the industry by feeding masses with content oriented hits one after the other. Iphoolish , born Mike Makori is currently working on his 7 track EP called KING.
https://va.lnk.to/hideaway
#iphoolishVEVO #blackmarketrecords #blackmarketafrika #kenya

snippet.title: Chelsea Squad Arrive For Training After Lampard Sacking
snippet.description:
Chelsea's squad arrived for their first training session just hours after head coach Frank Lampard was sacked earlier on Monday.

The decision to sack former Chelsea player Lampard came after he lost five of the last eight in the Premier League games and dropped to ninth place, despite benefiting from nearly $300 million spent on new players for this season.

Former PSG manager Thomas Tuchel in pole position to replace him.

00:00 Kai Havertz
00:10 Olivier Giroud
00:16 Reece James
00:24 Kurt Zouma
00:34 Marcos Alonso
00:42 Kepa
00:50 Willy Caballero
00:57 Emerson Palmieri

en-GB.title: Chelsea Squad Arrive For Training After Lampard Sacking
en-GB.description:
Chelsea's squad arrived for their first training session just hours after head coach Frank Lampard was sacked earlier on Monday.

The decision to sack former Chelsea player Lampard came after he lost five of the last eight in the Premier League games and dropped to ninth place, despite benefiting from nearly $300 million spent on new players for this season.

Former PSG manager Thomas Tuchel in pole position to replace him.

snippet.title: WATCH: Harris escorts the Pences as they depart U.S. Capitol
snippet.description:
Skip to 12:49 to watch Harris and Emhoff escort the Pences down the Capitol steps.

Vice President Kamala Harris and second gentleman Douglas Emhoff escorted former Vice President Mike Pence and second lady Karen Pence to their departure from the U.S. Capitol after Harris and President Joe Biden were sworn in on Wednesday.

While former President Donald Trump never formally conceded to Biden, Pence called Harris to offer his congratulations and assistance in the transition five days ago.

snippet.description:

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

snippet.title: Old Trafford or Anfield? Ronaldo or Messi? Lukaku & De Bruyne play 'You Have To Answer' | ESPN FC
snippet.description:
The questions pour in as Inter Milan’s Romelu Lukaku and Manchester City’s Kevin De Bruyne take on ESPN’s “You Have to Answer” challenge during international duty with Belgium. Anfield or Old Trafford? Kylian Mbappe or Neymar? Win the European Championship or the Champions League? Lionel Messi or Cristiano Ronaldo? “Game of Thrones” or “Breaking Bad”? London or New York?

#ESPNFC

snippet.title: I Thank God - Maverick City Music x UPPERROOM
snippet.description:
Official Music Video for "I Thank God" featuring Dante Bowe, Maryanne J. George, Aaron Moses, and Chuck Butler by Maverick City Music and UPPERROOM! 

"I Thank God" was written by Jesse Cline, Maryanne J George, Dante Bowe, Aaron Moses, and Chuck Butler. This video was captured at a live recording at UPPERROOM Dallas.

Move Your Heart - by Maverick City Music and UPPERROOM will be available 1/29/21 everywhere you listen to music!
